title: Normalize optimizer score editor YAML before agent edits

comments.author: ryan
comments.text: Starting implementation for optimizer edit-surface reliability. Plan: normalize score YAML in score_editor_toolset setup/load using ruamel.yaml block-scalar formatting, keep editor protocol unchanged, add tests for setup/load normalization and parse-failure behavior, then run targeted tests plus push/CI on a dedicated git-flow worktree branch.

comments.author: ryan
comments.text: Implementation complete in isolated worktree branch bugfix/optimizer-score-editor-normalization. Added YAML normalization in score_editor_toolset setup/load using ruamel round-trip parsing plus LiteralScalarString conversion for multiline strings, with explicit load-error surfacing via setup/get_content/view. Added focused tests covering setup normalization, API-load normalization, submit on normalized content, and invalid-YAML failure. Local verification: .venv/bin/python -m pytest -q plexus/cli/procedure/test_score_editor_toolset.py -> 5 passed.
